title: Docker APIv2 `images/get` endpoint not working.
body:
To reproduce:
```
curl "http://localhost:1234/v1.38/images/get?names=quay.io/mvasek/faas-quarkus-jvm-bp:v999" -v       
*   Trying ::1:1234...
* Connected to localhost (::1) port 1234 (#0)
> GET /v1.38/images/get?names=quay.io/mvasek/faas-quarkus-jvm-bp:v999 HTTP/1.1
> Host: localhost:1234
> User-Agent: curl/7.76.1
> Accept: */*
> 
* Mark bundle as not supporting multiuse
< HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error
< Api-Version: 1.40
< Content-Type: application/json
< Libpod-Api-Version: 3.2.0-dev
< Server: Libpod/3.2.0-dev (linux)
< Date: Wed, 05 May 2021 18:47:59 GMT
< Content-Length: 121
< 
{"cause":"unspported format \"\" for saving images","message":"unspported format \"\" for saving images","response":500}
* Connection #0 to host localhost left intact
```

This has been introduced in `migrate Podman to containers/common/libimage` a278195.

comments.body: the test for the endpoint is commented
